about.title: About me
about.description: I'm a fullstack developer passionate about creating digital experiences that connect people and businesses. I have hands-on experience developing online stores, system integrations, automation, and optimizing online sales processes. I always strive for scalable, clean, and efficient solutions, prioritizing performance and user experience.
about.skill_desc: Scalable Frontend development with React and TypeScript.
